# AA Self Storage MiniBodegas

> Secure, affordable self storage in La Uruca, San José, Costa Rica. English-speaking staff. No contract. CCTV security. Units from $50/month USD.

## About

AA Self Storage MiniBodegas is a self-storage facility located in La Uruca, San José, Costa Rica — right next to Migración y Extranjería (Costa Rica's main immigration office), on the road to Juan Santamaría Airport.

We serve expats, locals, businesses, and anyone in transition. All communication available in English and Spanish.

## Unit Types & Pricing

- Type A: 1.5×1.5m (2.25 m²) — $50/month
- Type B: 2×2m (4 m²) — $80/month
- Type C: 4×2.25m (10 m²) — $200/month
- Type D: 4×4.5m (18 m²) — $180/month
- Type E: 6×6m (36 m²) — $360/month

All prices in USD. Month-to-month, no long-term contract required.

## Location

La Uruca, San José, Costa Rica
Next to Migración y Extranjería (Immigration Office) · Road to Juan Santamaría Airport
Direct access from Ruta 27, Ruta 32, Autopista General Cañas, and Interamericana Norte.

## Hours

Monday – Friday: 8:00am – 5:00pm
Saturday & Sunday: Closed

## Contact

- Phone: +506 4000-0854
- WhatsApp: +506 8422-7985
- Website: https://aastorage.web.app

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- Self storage Costa Rica: yes
- Expat-friendly: yes, English-speaking staff
- Mini bodegas San José: yes
- Security: CCTV cameras at entry and gate
- Contract required: no
- Minimum term: month-to-month
- Currency: USD
